name: Clutch In
description: Clutch pedal depressing to disengage drive

prompts.label: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk
prompts.text: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: drivetrain disconnecting with spring-loaded pedal travel
prompts.text: drivetrain disconnecting with spring-loaded pedal travel, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: gearbox freewheeling as clutch plate separates
prompts.text: gearbox freewheeling as clutch plate separates, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: hydraulic cylinder compressing with building fluid pressure
prompts.text: hydraulic cylinder compressing with building fluid pressure, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: transmission ready for gear selection with neutral whir
prompts.text: transmission ready for gear selection with neutral whir, submarine pressure hull, copper pipe resonance ping, precision clockwork ticking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, smooth fade out
